name: Tomato and Fennel Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 large bulb fennel, cored and fronds removed
4 medium tomatoes, cut into wedges and seeded
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
2 tablespoons finely chopped fennel fronds or cilantro
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the fennel bulb into 4 pieces.
2. Cut the tomatoes into wedges and remove seeds.
3. In a bowl, whisk together Dijon mustard, red wine vinegar, salt, and pepper until well combined.
4. Pour the dressing over the fennel and tomatoes.
5. Sprinkle chopped fennel fronds or cilantro on top.
Yield: 6 servings
